description_long: This object is a neatly folded newspaper, featuring a prominent sports section headline and a large photograph on the front page. The newspaper is composed of several sheets of thin, white paper, stacked and creased along one edge. The front page displays bold black text, including the word 'SPORTS' and a headline reading 'Near perfection,' with additional smaller articles and columns visible. The photograph beneath the headline shows a sports scene, likely from a baseball game, with players and a crowd in the background. The edges of the newspaper are slightly curved, and the paper appears crisp and clean, with no visible tears or stains. The overall appearance suggests it is a freshly printed edition, ready for sale or distribution in an urban environment.
description: A freshly folded newspaper with a bold sports headline and a large front-page photograph, featuring crisp white paper and clear black print.
description_view_0: The folded edge of the newspaper is visible, showing the thickness of the stacked pages and the bold 'SPORTS' headline.
description_view_1: A flat, top-down view highlights the front page layout, with the headline, photograph, and article columns clearly visible.
description_view_2: The opposite folded edge is shown, emphasizing the neat crease and the continuation of the front-page design.
description_view_3: A direct view of the front page, displaying the headline, photograph, and article text in full detail.
